title: LimeAR Platform
description: LimeAR is an augmented reality platform designed to help brands create immersive, sales-driven experiences. The project involved designing a seamless interface and developing a performant frontend system.

title: Creative Beans
description: Creative Beans is a platform focused on enabling creators to showcase and monetize their work. The focus was on clarity, interaction design, and building a scalable frontend system.
